gate_1A_physical_closure.note: Should approach numerical precision (~ -100 dB in float64). If > -80 dB, check delay/Doppler sign convention, normalisation, or path truncation.

gate_1B_oracle_support_value.note: Oracle support + LS vs nearest-neighbour interpolation. Positive gain means true DD locations add value with estimated gains.

gate_1C_estimated_support_value.note: DD-estimated support + LS vs Oracle support + LS. Δ_support measures the cost of using DD-estimated (not true) locations.

gate_1D0_legacy_cross_attention.note: Legacy softmax cross-attention. Token-use audit confirms DD prior dependence, but DD+LS baseline is consistently better.

gate_1D1_physical_residual.note: PhysicalResidualEstimator with complex-gain tokens (9-dim), explicit H_phys reconstruction, and TF residual gated fusion. Target: surpass DD+LS baseline (−8.4 dB).
